sso_login_box_contact_admin_for_config: Please contact your administrator for configuration.
login_page_tagline_part1: Light writing, flowing with the cloud
login_page_tagline_part2: Cloud documents with flexible image upload options
auth_callback_finish_description: Please wait, we are finishing the login and returning to your workspace.
homepage_tagline: Write light, flow with the cloud
homepage_hero_description: A lightweight cloud document app with smooth writing and multiple image upload options.
homepage_meta_description: Cyime is a lightweight cloud writing workspace with online editing, real-time collaboration, public sharing, and multi-device access.
homepage_online_sync_description: Wherever you are, inspiration is never lost. All content is synced to the cloud in real-time, allowing you to seamlessly switch between browser, desktop, or mobile devices to continue your creation.
homepage_focus_writing_description: We believe the best tools are invisible. The clean interface design allows you to fully focus on the content itself, completing every piece of writing without distractions.
homepage_smooth_editor_description: Built on the latest Web technologies, every keystroke is silky smooth. Enjoy millisecond-level response speed, completely bidding farewell to the lag and stickiness of cloud editors.
homepage_feature_writing_desc: A clean interface that lets you focus entirely on your content. No distractions, just you and your words.
homepage_feature_media_desc: We’re building a simple, practical media management workflow: manage images and files in one place, trace each item back to the documents that reference it, paste to upload to your image hosting, and export to publish in one go.
homepage_feature_sync_desc: Content syncs to the cloud in real-time. Pick up where you left off on any device, anytime.
homepage_feature_collab_desc: Multiple people editing the same document simultaneously, powered by CRDT technology for conflict-free consistency.
homepage_feature_i18n_desc: Switch between Chinese and English interfaces to suit your language preference.
homepage_cta_desc: Light, clean, and easy to use. It's that simple.
workspace_shared_page_description: Documents shared to you by others. Actions are scoped by your role.
workspace_shared_empty_description: When someone shares a document with you, it will show up here.
workspace_shared_leave_confirm: Leave "{title}"? You will lose access to this document.
workspace_shared_disabled: Sharing and collaboration are currently disabled
workspace_notification_empty_description: New collaboration invites will appear here.
folder_delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this folder? All contents inside will also be deleted.
document_delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this document?
move_dialog_error_self_move: Cannot move a folder into itself
workspace_empty_description: Click "New Document" or "New Folder" to start creating.
trash_description: Items here will be automatically permanently deleted after 30 days.
trash_delete_permanent_confirm: Are you sure you want to permanently delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.
trash_empty_confirm: Are you sure you want to empty the trash? All {count} items will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.
trash_empty_state_description: There are no deleted items here.
editor_collaboration_pending_multi: Detected {count} active sessions, but collaboration is not connected yet
editor_collaboration_single_online: Only you are editing right now
editor_collaboration_disconnected_single: Collaboration disconnected. Switched to single-user mode
editor_collaboration_session_limit_reach: This document has reached the online session limit
This document has reached the online session limit ({count})
editor_export_manual_copy_description: Images have been processed. Because the browser only allows clipboard writes from a fresh user action after a long conversion, click copy once more.
editor_export_manual_copy_failed: Copy failed. Select the text and copy it manually.
editor_export_image_bed_timeout: The image bed timed out. Try again later, or check whether the image bed service is available.
editor_export_image_bed_upload_failed: Failed to upload images to the image bed. Check the image bed configuration or try again later.
editor_export_private_images_config_requ: This document contains private images. Configure and enable an image bed before exporting.
editor_export_private_images_dialog_titl: Private images cannot be exported directly
editor_export_private_images_dialog_mess: This document contains {count} private images. Markdown and HTML exports cannot reliably access signed links, so upload them to an image bed before continuing.
editor_export_private_images_dialog_help: "Save As" creates a copied document and replaces image links there; "Replace" updates the current document content and image upload preference, then continues exporting.
editor_math_inline_description: Insert a LaTeX expression that flows with the paragraph.
editor_math_block_description: Insert a standalone LaTeX block expression.
editor_external_image_invalid: Please enter a valid image URL
editor_paste_only_support_image_files: Only PNG/JPG/WebP/GIF images can be pasted. Export other files as images before uploading.
editor_image_insert_description: Drag an image in to upload it, or paste an external image URL below.
editor_image_insert_drop_title: Drop an image here, or click to choose
editor_document_settings_basic_descripti: Manage title and description so collaborators understand the document at a glance.
editor_document_settings_description_pla: Add purpose, audience, or writing scope for this document.
editor_document_settings_description_hin: Manual description takes priority; leave empty to fall back to auto summary.
editor_document_settings_public_hint: Select access level and copy the link. Private images remain protected; external image URLs still render.
editor_document_settings_permissions_des: Configure who can view, edit, and invite collaborators.
editor_document_settings_image_descripti: Choose the default target used when images are pasted or uploaded in this document.
editor_document_settings_image_help_priv: Private managed storage uploads to your configured S3 and does not expose public direct links by default.
editor_document_settings_image_help_publ: Public image beds return accessible URLs immediately and are suited for published content.
editor_document_settings_image_help_migr: Private images will later support one-click migration to public image beds with auto replacement.
editor_image_target_update_failed: Failed to update image upload target
editor_image_target_managed_r2_descripti: Store in your private media library with asset refs and cleanup control.
editor_image_target_see_public_descripti: Upload with the configured S.EE token and insert the returned public URL.
editor_image_target_lsky_public_descript: Upload through the configured Lsky Pro instance URL and API token.
editor_unsaved_confirm_leave: You have unsaved changes. Leave this page anyway?
meta_site_description: Cyime is a lightweight cloud writing workspace with online editing, real-time collaboration, public sharing, and multi-device access.
meta_document_preview_fallback: Open this document in Cyime with lightweight writing, collaboration, and public access preview support.
meta_document_preview_with_title: Open "{title}" in Cyime with lightweight writing, collaboration, and public access preview support.
viewer_sign_in_required: Sign in is required to view this document.
user_overview_trashed_documents_hint: Moved to trash and still restorable.
user_overview_limit_unlimited_hint: No document creation limit is configured for this account.
user_center_description: Use the left sidebar to enter profile, security, and media settings.
user_profile_description: Profile settings skeleton is ready. Next step can wire editable display name and avatar upload.
user_profile_avatar_description: Click the avatar to update or upload a new one.
user_profile_display_name_description: The name shown across the workspace.
user_profile_language_description: Choose the interface language. "Follow system" uses your browser language.
user_profile_email_description: Email address used for account linking and login.
user_image_beds_description: Create reusable public image-bed targets for documents. Admin-wide defaults can be layered in later.
user_image_beds_empty: No image-bed configs yet. Add one and it will appear in document upload target choices.
user_image_beds_name_placeholder: For example Blog Images or Test Bed
user_image_beds_base_url_help: Enter the image-bed site root URL, without the upload API path.
user_image_beds_chevereto_base_url_help: Enter the Chevereto site root URL, without /api/1/upload.
user_image_beds_lsky_base_url_help: Enter the Lsky site URL, without trailing /api/v2/upload.
user_image_beds_api_token_placeholder: Enter the API token for this provider
user_image_beds_api_token_help: Create an upload token or API key in your image-bed dashboard and paste it here.
user_image_beds_storage_id_help: Required. Use the storage_id of your selected Lsky storage policy.
user_image_beds_lsky_storage_id_help: Required. Use the storage_id of your selected Lsky storage policy.
user_image_beds_strategy_placeholder: Optional. Leave empty to use the default strategy.
user_image_beds_strategy_help: Optional. Leave empty to let the image bed use its default strategy.
user_image_beds_lsky_strategy_help: Optional. Leave empty to let the image bed use its default strategy.
user_image_beds_enabled_toggle: Allow documents to choose this target after saving
user_image_beds_form_description: Each config can have its own display name, provider, and upload parameters.
user_security_description: Review and manage active sessions for this account.
user_security_sessions_description: These sessions can still refresh login state. Revoke devices you no longer use.
user_security_other_sessions_hint: These sessions remain signed in until revoked or expired.
user_security_next_step_description: Password change and account binding can be added later.
user_media_description: Media library skeleton is ready. Next step can connect list pagination and reference lookup APIs.
user_media_delete_disabled_referenced: This asset is still referenced by documents
user_media_delete_disabled_unavailable: This asset cannot be deleted right now
user_media_toast_cannot_delete_reference: This asset is still referenced and cannot be deleted
user_media_confirm_delete_asset: Delete asset "{filename}"? This action cannot be undone.
user_media_delete_hint_remove_references: This image is still referenced by documents below. Remove it in those documents and save, then delete it here.
user_avatar_dialog_description: Upload an image, or use your GitHub avatar directly.
user_avatar_error_too_large: Avatar is still over {size}MB after processing, please use a smaller image
user_sharing_description: View and manage documents you've shared with others or made publicly accessible.
user_sharing_section_description: Manage documents you've shared with others and those with public access enabled.
user_sharing_empty_description: Documents you share with others or make publicly accessible will appear here.
admin_overview_description: Monitor the current instance and its user quota status.
admin_overview_user_count_hint: Total registered accounts in this instance.
admin_overview_admin_count_hint: Accounts currently allowed to enter the admin panel.
admin_overview_global_quota_unlimited_hi: The global default does not limit document creation.
admin_overview_global_quota_limited_hint: Users in inherit mode fall back to this global default.
admin_users_description: Search users and manage per-user document quota rules.
admin_users_empty: No users matched the current filters.
admin_users_search_placeholder: Search by email or display name
admin_users_quota_invalid: Please enter a non-negative integer quota
admin_user_detail_description: Review this account and adjust its document quota policy.
admin_user_detail_quota_hint: Use inherit to follow the global default, or override it for this user only.
admin_user_sessions_description: Shows recent active devices for this account.
admin_user_media_description: Open a dedicated page to review this user's uploaded media assets.
admin_user_media_empty: No media assets matched the current filters.
admin_user_account_description: Adjust this account's email and verification state.
admin_user_account_email_hint: Updating the email replaces the current login email and resets it to unverified.
admin_user_account_email_verify_hint: Admins can directly mark the current email as verified.
admin_users_purge_media_hint: Permanently delete all media assets uploaded by this user.
admin_users_purge_docs_hint: Permanently delete all documents and folders owned by this user.
admin_users_unregister_hint: Completely remove this user account and all associated data from the system.
admin_users_purge_media_confirm_msg: This will permanently delete all media assets uploaded by this user. This action cannot be undone.
admin_users_purge_docs_confirm_msg: This will permanently delete all documents and folders owned by this user, including their content and collaboration history. This action cannot be undone.
admin_users_unregister_confirm_msg: This will completely remove this user account and all associated data (media, documents, settings) from the system. This action is final and cannot be reversed.
